zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Clifford於1414年8月20日出生在英國越可爾斯吉普頓時，他的父親Sir John Clifford25歲，母親Elizabeth Percy19歲。他於1429年之前與Joan Dacre在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1455年5月22日在英國賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Clifford于1414年8月20日出生在英国越可爾斯吉普頓时，他的父亲Sir John Clifford25岁，母亲Elizabeth Percy19岁。他于1429年之前与Joan Dacre在英国越可爾斯凱爾頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1455年5月22日在英国賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Clifford in Devon, Gloucestershire, and Yorkshire, and in particular Herefordshire. The placename is derived from Old English clif ‘slope’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish: adoption of the name in 1 above as Anglicization of several Irish names, especially Ó Clúmháin ‘descendant of Clúmhán’, which was the surname of an ecclesiastical family in Sligo and can be traced back to the 12th century. The personal name meant ‘little hairy one’, a diminutive of Irish clúmach ‘hairy’, from clúmh ‘feathers, plumage, down; hair or fur’. Clifford was also adopted for Coleman and in Fermanagh for Crifferty, Clifferty, and Cliffordy, which are Anglicized forms of Mac Raibheartaigh (compare Rafferty ).

History: A powerful Anglo-Norman family of this name in England and Ireland trace their descent from Walter de Clifford, who took the name from Clifford (Castle) in Herefordshire in the 12th century, after acquiring the Clifford barony by marriage.

variants.name: Coleman
meanings: Irish and English: from the Middle English personal name Col(e)man, Old Irish Colmán, earlier Columbán, adopted as Old Norse Kalman. It was introduced into Cumbria, Westmorland, and Yorkshire by Norwegians from Ireland and probably spread widely across England. Ó Colmáin (‘descendant of Colmán’) was the name of an Irish missionary to Europe, also known as Saint Columban(us) (c. 540–615), who founded the monastery of Bobbio in northern Italy in 614. Columbanus is formally a derivative of the Latin for ‘dove’, seen in the name of the 6th-century missionary known in English as Saint Columba (521–597), who converted the Picts to Christianity. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Irish: from Mac Colmáin or Ó Colmáin ‘son (or descendant) of Colmán’.
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kalman   or   Kolman  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Clifford was born on 20 August 1414, in Skipton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir John Clifford, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Percy, was 19. He married Joan Dacre before 1429, in Skelton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 22 May 1455, in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 40.

Il a épousé Joan Dacre avant 1429, à Skelton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 22 mai 1455, à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Cliffordが1414年8月20日にイギリスヨークシュアイアスキプトンで生まれた時，父Sir John Cliffordは25歳，母Elizabeth Percyは19歳であった。1429年以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトンでJoan Dacreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1455年5月22日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Clifford(이)가 1414년 8월 20일 영국 요르크실르 스키프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Clifford(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Percy(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1429년 이전 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴에서 Joan Dacre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1455년 5월 22일 영국 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Joan Dacre antes 1429, em Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de maio de 1455, em St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Clifford родился 20 августа 1414 г. в местности скиптон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Clifford было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Percy, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Dacre перед 1429 г. в местности скелтон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 22 мая 1455 г. в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет.
